description: White House booking style card against a solid black background. At the top, in large bold orange italic all caps, is the word 'ARRESTED.' Below it sits a large rounded corner white panel containing a tight, frontal close-up photograph of a man with dark hair, heavy eyebrows, and a mustache, looking directly at the camera against a blurred institutional interior. Beneath the photo, inside the white panel, bold black all caps type reads 'ILLEGAL ALIEN.' Directly below the panel, white sans-serif text lists the charges: 'Third-degree rape, Unlawful imprisonment, Second-degree assault with a deadly weapon.' At the bottom center is the small white line art White House emblem next to the engraved serif wordmark 'The WHITE HOUSE.' The image uses a black, orange, and white palette. The tweet reads 'Criminal illegal aliens will be arrested. They will be deported. No exceptions.'
notable_text: ARRESTED | ILLEGAL ALIEN | Third-degree rape, Unlawful imprisonment, Second-degree assault with a deadly weapon | The WHITE HOUSE
